name: POPS_IOX.PAK
role: USB/SMB support package expected by POPStarter.
notes: Document path requirements, never mirror the binary.

name: POPS.ELF
role: Sony POPS emulator payload used by HDD workflows.
notes: Proprietary emulator file. Mention by filename/hash only.

name: IOPRP252.IMG
role: IOP reset image expected in HDD POPS workflows.
notes: Mention by filename/hash only.

name: POPSTARTER.ELF
safeReference: r13 Beta 2019-06-05 final public build; MD5 97afa02d25f37fa1e2f602dd6c48d442 in recovered reference.
notes: Public homebrew artifact, but this site still does not host package downloads.

name: POPSTARTER.KELF
safeReference: r13 Beta 2019-06-05 final public build; MD5 a654a0a9093ce7be8767b708bc8cb8a1 in recovered reference.
notes: Used for HDDOSD-visible partition installs.

name: POPStarter_r13_Beta_20190605.zip
safeReference: Use package/date/build identity only; no mirror link here.
notes: Preferred over older RIP/WIP packages.

name: POPStarter_r13_RIP_06.zip
notes: Recovered history says the 2019-06-05 r13 Beta is the canonical final package.

name: POPStarter_r13_WIP_06_OBT_20170128.zip
notes: Do not prefer this over the final 2019-06-05 build.

name: Compatibility_Modes.zip
safeReference: PATCH_1.BIN through PATCH_7.BIN family; no download link.
notes: Use the compatibility map before applying globally.

name: FORCEPAL_PATCH.7z
notes: Do not combine with $NOPAL.

name: NOPAL_PATCH.7z
notes: Filename collides with a later loader-disable PATCH_9.BIN workaround; keep the purposes separate.

name: IGR_Behaviour_Modifiers.zip
role: TROJAN_0.BIN through TROJAN_5.BIN IGR modifier family.
notes: External mirror links are intentionally omitted.

name: IGR_textures_-_Chinese_pack.7z
notes: Texture placement depends on storage backend and POPS folder scope.

name: CHEATS.TXT
notes: Keep case uppercase on case-sensitive paths.

name: SAMPLE_CHEATS.TXT
notes: Named commands do not require $SAFEMODE; raw code blocks usually should use it.

name: CUE2POPS_2.3.zip
safeReference: Recovered as zip in the reference inventory.
notes: Also bundled inside recovered Quickstarter packs.

name: Disc_Combining_Kits.7z
notes: Keep separate from any excluded multi-disc utilities that should not appear in the public site.

name: POPStarter_USB_Quickstarter_Pack_20200209.zip
notes: Use as a historical layout reference; do not mirror links.

name: POPStarter_HDD_Quickstarter_Pack_20200209.zip
notes: Use as a historical layout reference; do not mirror links.

name: POPStarter_SMB_Quickstarter_Pack_20200209.zip
notes: Contains network-module layout references; do not mirror links.

name: POPStarter_HDD_Quickstarter_Pack_20171027.7z
notes: Superseded for most users by the 2020 package naming.

name: network_modules.7z
safeReference: poweroff.irx, ps2dev9.irx, smsutils.irx, ps2ip.irx, ps2smap.irx, smbman.irx.
notes: The recovered reference notes the SMB Quickstarter pack also contains these modules.

name: DS3_modules_BT_20171017.7z
notes: Peripheral module pack, not required for a normal POPStarter storage setup.

name: DS3_modules_USB_20171017.7z
notes: Peripheral module pack, not required for a normal POPStarter storage setup.

name: RadHostClient_1.8a.7z
notes: Related to older host workflows, not current SMB setup.

name: pfsshell-0.2a.zip
notes: Useful for HDD/PFS maintenance references.

name: POPStarter_ELFs-BATCHER_05062016.7z
role: PC helper for batch-created renamed POPStarter ELFs.
notes: Historical helper for per-game ELF workflows.

name: BATCHER_0.3.1.EXE
notes: Kept as a missing inventory row, not a download.

name: PPF_Bunch_pack.7z
role: PPF patches mapping user-friendly patch names to config bytes.
safeReference: DEBUG_AND_HALT, NO_VMC, ONLY_1ST_VMC, NO_PAL, FORCE_MODEX, DEFAULT_IGR_TEXTURES, LC_ONLY, NO_AUTO_PATCH, NO_LC_CRACKS.
notes: Useful for explaining config byte aliases even without the package.

name: hddosd_sample_files.7z
notes: Relevant to PP.<game> / POPSTARTER.KELF legacy installs.

name: uLE_kHn_20160723.7z
notes: Later quickstarter packs contain uLaunchELF/BOOT.ELF references.

name: uLE_kHn_20191110.zip
notes: The 2020-08-10 loader-address fix is separate history and should be documented by date rather than mirrored binary.
